title: Create: Brass Recipe
description: Adds a recipe for brass in the create mod.
body:
Ever wanted to craft Brass in the Create mod, but couldn't? Well with this simple mod you can! This mod makes it so Brass Ingots are craftable

All you need is 1 Copper and 2 Zinc Ingots and you have Brass! Automate making your Brass like never before!

Requires Create: https://modrinth.com/mod/create

Create Fabric does work, you would just have to install is seperate, on a different launcher.
